reasoning: Zootopia 2 is releasing on Wednesday, November 26, 2025, ahead of Thanksgiving. The resolution specifically targets the 3-day weekend (Friday, November 28 to Sunday, November 30). Historically, movies that open on Wednesday burn a large portion of their initial demand before the Friday-Sunday window, inherently lowering their 3-day weekend gross. Furthermore, 2025 features heavily front-loaded blockbusters opening on regular Fridays, such as 'Jurassic World Rebirth', 'Superman', and 'Avatar: Fire and Ash'. Historically, the highest 3-day domestic opening of any year belongs to a massive summer, winter, or spring Friday blockbuster (often grossing $130M–$200M+), whereas no Wednesday Thanksgiving release has ever achieved the highest 3-day weekend of the year. The Polymarket price of 7% likely represents a long-shot premium or low-liquidity floor. Therefore, the true probability is extremely low.
